content.content: American makeup artist and Instagram model who has attracted more than 330,000 followers to her Alejandraxoxx Instagram account. She publishes tutorials, daily life photos and selfies to her feed. She posted a first piece of media to her Instagram account in November of 2014. She has used YouTube to publish makeup content. Her channel name is the same as her Instagram account, Alejandraxoxx. She is half Puerto Rican and half Caucasian. She has a younger brother and her mother's name is Linnette. She was invited to be part of a huge group chat with fellow influencers includingDessimua,Velvet Alien,Molly O'Maliaand many others.
